title: Open Cloze: The History of Football

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE HISTORY OF FOOTBALL
tasks.text:
Football is 1.1. _________ most popular sport in the world, with billions of fans on every continent. People have been kicking balls around for thousands of years, 1.2. _________ modern football as we know it began in England in the nineteenth century. The first official rules 1.3. _________ written in 1863, when the Football Association was founded in London.

The sport spread quickly to 1.4. _________ countries, especially in Europe and South America. The first World Cup 1.5. _________ held in Uruguay in 1930, and only thirteen teams took part 1.6. _________ it. Today, more 1.7. _________ two hundred nations compete to qualify for the tournament.

Football has produced 1.8. _________ legendary players, such as Pele, Maradona, and Messi. 1.9. _________ of them became famous not only for their skills but also for their dedication to the game. There is 1.10. _________ doubt that football will continue to grow in popularity for many years to come.
